sentences.arabic: كَانَ عِنْدَ زَيْنَبَ نُقُودٌ كَثِيرَةٌ فِي كُوزِ الخَزِّ.
sentences.translation: Zejneba je imala puno novca u kasici.
sentences.translationEn: Zaynab had a lot of money in her piggy bank.
She wanted to buy something useful.

sentences.arabic: فَكَّرَتْ كَثِيرًا ثُمَّ قَرَّرَتْ شِرَاءَ كِتَابٍ.
sentences.translation: Dugo je razmišljala pa odlučila kupiti knjigu.
sentences.translationEn: She thought for a long time then decided to buy a book.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ سَعِيدَةً لِأَنَّهَا اشْتَرَتْ شَيْئًا مُفِيدًا.
sentences.translation: Bila je sretna što je kupila nešto korisno.
sentences.translationEn: She was happy because she bought something useful.

sentences.translation: Nastavila je štediti za sljedeći mjesec.
sentences.translationEn: She continued saving for the next month.
